text.title: Terraform IaC Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-workspaces
step.action: List every state file + the resources it manages + which env they belong to.

step.name: split-workspaces
step.action: terraform state mv resources into per-(env, layer) workspaces. Update backend config.
step.note: Gate: If state mv risks data loss, STOP — script the move + dry run.

step.name: extract-modules-to-registry
step.action: Publish to private registry with semver. Update callers to use source = registry.x version = 'y.z'.

step.name: wire-cross-workspace-refs
step.action: Replace hardcoded IDs with terraform_remote_state or data sources. Validate plan.

step.name: document-blast-radius
step.action: Write workspace README per workspace: resources, downstream services, change-window rules.
